home.description: Please, sign in or sign up to continue.

ajustes.title: Inventory Adjustments
ajustes.description: Correct product stock or view the adjustment history.

categorias.title: Categories
categorias.description: Group your products into categories to keep your inventory organized and facilitate searching.

clientes.title: Clients
clientes.description: Manage your client database for creating quotes.

configuracion.super_description: General settings that apply to the entire application as a fallback.
configuracion.admin_description: Customize the name and logo displayed in your workspace.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Welcome to your dashboard. From here you can navigate to the different sections of the application.
dashboard.inventoryCostDescription: Capital tied up in stock (based on cost).

depositos.title: Warehouses
depositos.description: Create and manage the physical locations (warehouses, stores) where your products are stored.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about using the application.

inventario.title: General Inventory
inventario.jefe_description: Check the stock status of your assigned warehouse.
inventario.general_description: Filter and search to see the stock status of all products.

movimientos.title: Stock Movements
movimientos.description: Record stock entries and exits or view the history of delivery notes.

pedidos.title: Pending Orders
pedidos.description: Product requests that require your action to be processed.

precios.title: A plan for every stage of your business
precios.description: Choose the plan that best suits the size and needs of your team.

presupuestos.title: Quotes
presupuestos.description: Create and manage product quotations for your clients.

productos.title: Products
productos.description: Here you can register the items in your inventory. Each product is associated with a category and a supplier.

proveedores.title: Suppliers
proveedores.description: Register the companies or people who supply you with products. You will need at least one supplier to create products.

solicitudes.title: Requests Portal
solicitudes.description: Create a product order for a Warehouse Manager to approve.

suscripcion.title: Subscription & Billing
suscripcion.description: Review your current plan, usage, and manage your subscription.

ubicaciones.title: Warehouse Locations
ubicaciones.description: Define the physical locations (shelves, racks, bins) within each warehouse.

usuarios.title: Users
usuarios.super_description: Manage all users in the system, assign roles, and monitor their activity.
usuarios.admin_description: Invite and manage your team members, assigning them roles according to their functions.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Manage the workspaces of each administrator.
